parameters.columns:
o.id, o.tx_ref, o.product, o.status,
                    o.expires_at,
                    o.data_used_gb, o.data_limit_gb,
                    pa.platform, pa.platform_user_id, pa.display_name,
                    c.id as customer_id
parameters.conditions: o.status = 'fulfilled' AND o.expires_at BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'

parameters.columns:
o.id, o.tx_ref, o.product, o.status,
                    o.data_used_gb, o.data_limit_gb,
                    pa.platform, pa.platform_user_id, pa.display_name,
                    c.id as customer_id
parameters.conditions: o.status = 'fulfilled' AND o.data_limit_gb IS NOT NULL AND (o.data_used_gb / NULLIF(o.data_limit_gb, 0)) >= 0.8
